message:
test: add proptest suite for FenwickTree (13 properties, 300 cases)

- from_slice matches incremental construction
- prefix_sum is cumulative sum of original values
- point_query recovers original values (to_vec roundtrip)
- range_sum equals slice sum over [left..=right]
- total_sum matches naive sum
- set then point_query returns new value with correct total
- reset zeros everything while preserving length
- merge is elementwise addition
- clone produces independent copy
- find_kth on non-negative values: returns smallest index where
  prefix_sum >= target; returns None above total
- stats serde roundtrip
- cumulative updates are additive (random update sequences)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
